title: Create Railways Navigator Retexture
description: A navigator and clock retexture for the Create Railways Navigator mod!
body:
A navigator and clock retexture for the [Create Railways Navigator](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-railways-navigator) mod to feel more immersive.
![Clock and Navigator retexture.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1182b1dbe763778a50fa1f23056d07b5a33eb307.jpeg)
